rationale: Educ. Code §21.160 governs teacher resignation under continuing contracts and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A teacher employed under a continuing contract may relinquish the position and leave the employment of the district at the end of a school year without penalty by filing with the board of trustees or its designee a written resignation not later than the 45th day before the first day of instruction of the following school year.
_note: No conflict: the rule text concerns educator employment contracts and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
